name: components/pagination
description: A control that enables users to navigate through paginated data sets by selecting specific pages or moving forward and backward. Provides a complete composition system with Pagination, PaginationContent, PaginationItem, PaginationLink, PaginationPrevious, PaginationNext, PaginationFirst, PaginationLast, and PaginationEllipsis. Supports active-page highlighting, disabled boundary states, and responsive ellipsis truncation for large page counts.
useCases: Data tables and search result grids with server-side paginated responses
Image galleries or article archives split into 10–50 items per page
Audit logs and activity feeds where chronological pages improve scan performance
API-documentation endpoints listing resources with limit/offset query parameters
usage: import { Pagination, PaginationContent, PaginationItem, PaginationLink, PaginationPrevious, PaginationNext, PaginationFirst, PaginationLast, PaginationEllipsis } from "shadcn-solid-components/components/pagination"
